author: doll-agent
content:
Done. dtype_to_arrow / arrow_to_dtype already mapped F16 <-> Float16 (behind f16 feature), but the ArrowElement marker trait had no impl for half::f16 - so generic ToArrow/FromArrow paths couldn't dispatch on f16 arrays.

Added impl_arrow_element!(half::f16, arrow::datatypes::Float16Type) behind #[cfg(feature = 'f16')]. Arrow 58 exposes Float16Type::Native = half::f16, so existing generics cover the full path.

roundtrip_f16 test asserts bit-exact preservation through Arrow Float16 via to_bits().

ferray-numpy-interop: 77 -> 78 tests with arrow+f16, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 629ec650.
